gigapan.name: Meitosis stages in mouse testis
gigapan.description:
6x4 mosaic, captured with 40x objective on microscope.
Individual frames captured as HD video, split into individual images, and then focus stacked with Zerene stacker.

Approximate scale is 8.7 pixels per micron

I was told that the large structures which are over 100 microns wide, are not the cells.  The cells are much smaller, the 8 micron scale bar is, I believe, bracketing one cell.  Corrections from actual biologists welcome!
